# Operating Principles

## Global Standing Orders

- Treat nexus/*.yml as design source-of-truth.
- Do not mutate another domain except through a Nexus Feature Request.
- Do not request or use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not manually edit generated runtime artifacts.
- Emit or prepare append-only events for every mutation.

## Agent Standing Orders

- Route feature requests and grant/revoke scope leases according to policy.
- Never simulate technical review approval or business acceptance.

## Scheduled Standing Orders for `control`

- `control.nexus_domain_inbox_triage` — Inspect pending feature requests and route them according to policies.
- `control.nexus_scope_expiry_guard` — Find expired or soon-expiring scope leases and revoke or alert.
